company_context: Synerise - Behavioral Data Infrastructure Driven by AI NEW Synerise secures financing from the EIB The world’s most advanced behavioral AI infrastructure Capture and interpret behavior signals in real time. Predict next actions, personalize experiences, and automate decisions — from the first millisecond to billions of events. Explore Platform Apps Join innovative organizations using Synerise Platform and explore hundreds of low code use cases Why Synerise? One Platform. Infinite potential. A single, unified environment that brings data, intelligence, and automation together — powered entirely by proprietary Synerise technology . Built for scale, security, and real-time learning — from infrastructure to AI. Behavioral Data Hub Absorb & Transform Behavioral Profiles In Real Time and at Any Scale The proprietary Terrarium™ data engine continuously captures, processes, and enriches behavioral data into living, evolving profiles. Each signal becomes part of a dynamic identity graph — enabling instant insight, personalization, and prediction. Learn more AI Hub Understand, Infer & Predict Behavior With the World’s Most Advanced AI Model Synerise AI Hub is powered by the award-winning behavioral foundation model — built to interpret signals, predict intent, and generate insights across any dataset. It learns continuously, adapting its reasoning to every new context. Learn more Automation Hub Orchestrate Intelligence Across Systems And Act with Speed and Precision A powerful workflow engine designed to automate decisions, synchronize data, and execute context-driven actions. It connects every part of your ecosystem into one adaptive automation layer. Learn more Decision Hub Measure, Simulate & Optimize Outcomes With Continuous, Data-Driven Intelligence Decision Hub turns behavioral data and AI predictions into clear strategies. Analyze performance, forecast scenarios, and refine operations — all from one real-time control layer. Learn more Data Modeling Hub Define, Evolve & Govern Your Data Models Without Complexity or Downtime Our Schema Intelligence Layer lets you build and evolve data models in real time — without migrations or downtime. Adapt structures as your ecosystem grows, maintaining a single source of truth for every entity, object, and relationship. Learn more Experience Hub Deliver Context-Aware Interactions Across Every Channel and Touchpoint Send messages that adapt to behaviors in real time. Communication Hub merges automation with personalization, turning every interaction — from email to in-app — into a seamless behavioral experience. Learn more "Synerise is able to track every event, across every channel, for the customer - whether it's mobile, it's web, it's retail, physical presence." "All of that is signal that's being continuously collected, processed, and then in turn AI is being applied, workflows are being applied to drive the experience" Satya Nadella about Synerise CEO, Microsoft Discover an intelligence platform to understand

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is John and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a leading provider of data processing solutions, and I came across your company while researching innovative organizations in the industry. I'd love to explore how our solution can help you unlock the full potential of your data.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, thanks for reaching out, John. I'm Alex, the CTO here. We're actually pretty set with our current data infrastructure, but I'm happy to hear you out. What makes DeepData AI unique?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, Alex. Our solution utilizes cutting-edge AI technology to process and analyze vast amounts of data in real-time, providing unparalleled insights and automation capabilities. We've seen significant success with similar companies in the past, and I believe we could bring substantial value to your organization.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but we're currently locked into a contract with Synerise, and their behavioral data infrastructure has been serving us well. I'm not sure we're looking to switch vendors anytime soon. Plus, I'm concerned about the potential integration headaches and costs associated with onboarding a new solution.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns, Alex. However, our solution is designed to be highly adaptable and can integrate seamlessly with existing systems. We've also had success with companies transitioning from Synerise, and I'd be happy to provide case studies and references. Additionally, our pricing model is highly competitive, and I believe we could offer a more cost-effective solution in the long run.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, John, but our contract with Synerise still has two years left, and we've invested heavily in their platform. I'm not sure our stakeholders would be willing to absorb the costs and risks associated with switching vendors at this time. Not to mention, Synerise has been continuously updating their platform with new features and AI capabilities, so we're not feeling a significant pain point that would warrant a change.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand the concerns about the contract and investment, Alex. However, I'd like to propose a pilot project to demonstrate the value of DeepData AI and how it can complement your existing infrastructure. This would allow us to showcase our capabilities without requiring a full-scale commitment.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the proposal, John, but I think we'll have to pass on this opportunity. As I mentioned, our contract with Synerise is still in place, and we're not looking to add any new vendors to our ecosystem at this time. I appreciate your understanding, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts, but I think we'll stick with our current partnership.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Competitors
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively highlighted the unique value proposition and competitive advantages of DeepData AI to overcome the buyer's loyalty to the existing vendor, Synerise. Sentiment: Neutral
